case_title: MEI, YAN FEN VS ALEMANY SHELL SERVICE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,718.56 FILED BY MEI, YAN FEN AS TO DEFENDANT ALEMANY SHELL SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-14-1998 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
